config.name: Variable Name
config.label: Nombre de variable
config.helper: Un nombre de variable es un nombre simbólico para hacer referencia a la información.

config.label: Etiqueta
config.helper: La etiqueta describe el nombre del campo

config.label: Texto de marcador de posición
config.helper: El marcador de posición es lo que se muestra en el campo cuando aún no se proporciona ningún valor

config.label: Reglas de validación
config.helper: Las reglas de validación necesarias para este campo

config.label: Texto auxiliar
config.helper: El texto de ayuda está destinado a proporcionar orientación adicional sobre el valor del campo

config.label: Color de texto
config.helper: Establezca el color de texto del elemento

config.label: Color de fondo
config.helper: Establecer el color de fondo del elemento

config.label: valor predeterminado
config.helper: El valor predeterminado se rellena previamente con los datos existentes de la solicitud. Esta característica le permitirá modificar el valor que se muestra cuando se carga la pantalla si es necesario.

script.title: FF_CH_Consultar_Cliente_SC
script.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  Welcome to ProcessMaker 4 Script Editor 
 *  To access Environment Variables use getenv("ENV_VAR_NAME") 
 *  To access Request Data use $data 
 *  To access Configuration Data use $config 
 *  To preview your script, click the Run button using the provided input and config data 
 *  Return an array and it will be merged with the processes data 
 *  Example API to retrieve user email by their ID $api->users()->getUserById(1)['email'] 
 *  API Documentation https://github.com/ProcessMaker/docker-executor-php/tree/master/docs/sdk 
 */

$urlBase = getenv("API_GATEWAY_URL");

if (!$urlBase) {
    throw new RuntimeException("API_GATEWAY_URL no está definido");
}

$path = "/api/find-client/corporate/api/cimm/apigateway/customer/";
//$path = "https://www12.chilena.cl/corporate/api/cimm/apigateway/customer/";
$numDoc = "18622148"; // $data["frmDC_rutContratante"]

// Construir URL completa
$url = $urlBase . $path . $numDoc;

// Inicializar curl
$curl = curl_init($url);

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 15,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,
    //CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json'
    ],
]);

$responseRaw = curl_exec($curl);

// Errores CURL
if (curl_errno($curl)) {
    $err = curl_error($curl);
    curl_close($curl);

    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "Error CURL: $err",
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

$httpStatus = curl_getinfo($curl, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

curl_close($curl);

// Errores HTTP
if ($httpStatus !== 200) {
    if($httpStatus == 404) {
        return [
            "frm_cliente_response" => [
                "result" => 0, 
                "rut" => null,
                "fullName" => null
            ]
        ];
    }
    else {
        return [
            "error"    => true,
            "message"  => "Error al consultar API - HTTP $httpStatus",
            "respuesta"=> $responseRaw,
            "url"      => $url
        ];
    }
}

$response = json_decode($responseRaw, true);

// Validar JSON
if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "JSON inválido: " . json_last_error_msg(),
        "raw" => $responseRaw,
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

return [
    "frm_cliente_response" => [
        "result" => 1, 
        "rut" => $response["rut"] . "-" . $response["dv"],
        "fullName" =>  $response["firstName"] . " " . $response["lastName"]
    ]
];

script.title: FF_CH_Obtener_Comunas_SC
script.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  Welcome to ProcessMaker 4 Script Editor 
 *  To access Environment Variables use getenv("ENV_VAR_NAME") 
 *  To access Request Data use $data 
 *  To access Configuration Data use $config 
 *  To preview your script, click the Run button using the provided input and config data 
 *  Return an array and it will be merged with the processes data 
 *  Example API to retrieve user email by their ID $api->users()->getUserById(1)['email'] 
 *  API Documentation https://github.com/ProcessMaker/docker-executor-php/tree/master/docs/sdk 
 */

$urlBase = getenv("API_GATEWAY_URL");

if (!$urlBase) {
    throw new RuntimeException("API_GATEWAY_URL no está definido");
}

$path = "/api/find-client/corporate/api/cimm/apigateway/customer/";
//$numDoc = "12749360";
//$numDoc = "12345670"; 
$numDoc = $data["frmDC_rutContratante_aux"];

// Construir URL completa
$url = $urlBase . $path . $numDoc;
//$url = "https://www12.chilena.cl/corporate/api/cimm/apigateway/customer/" . $numDoc;

// Inicializar curl
$curl = curl_init($url);

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 15,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,
    //CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json'
    ],
]);

$responseRaw = curl_exec($curl);

// Errores CURL
if (curl_errno($curl)) {
    $err = curl_error($curl);
    curl_close($curl);

    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "Error CURL: $err",
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

$httpStatus = curl_getinfo($curl, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

curl_close($curl);

// Errores HTTP
if ($httpStatus !== 200) {
    if($httpStatus == 404) {
        return [
            "result" => 0, 
            "rut" => null,
            "fullName" => null
        ];
    }
    else {
        return [
            "error"    => true,
            "message"  => "Error al consultar API - HTTP $httpStatus",
            "respuesta"=> $responseRaw,
            "url"      => $url
        ];
    }
}

$response = json_decode($responseRaw, true);

// Validar JSON
if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "JSON inválido: " . json_last_error_msg(),
        "raw" => $responseRaw,
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

return [
    "result" => 1,
    "rut" => $response["rut"] . "-" . $response["dv"],
    "name" =>  $response["firstName"],
    "lastName" => $response["lastName"]
];

script.title: FF_CH_Obtener_Ciudades_SC
script.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  Welcome to ProcessMaker 4 Script Editor 
 *  To access Environment Variables use getenv("ENV_VAR_NAME") 
 *  To access Request Data use $data 
 *  To access Configuration Data use $config 
 *  To preview your script, click the Run button using the provided input and config data 
 *  Return an array and it will be merged with the processes data 
 *  Example API to retrieve user email by their ID $api->users()->getUserById(1)['email'] 
 *  API Documentation https://github.com/ProcessMaker/docker-executor-php/tree/master/docs/sdk 
 */

$urlBase = getenv("API_GATEWAY_URL");

if (!$urlBase) {
    throw new RuntimeException("API_GATEWAY_URL no está definido");
}

$path = "/api/find-cities/corporate/api/cimm/apigateway/form/cities";

// Construir URL completa
$url = $urlBase . $path;

// Inicializar curl
$curl = curl_init($url);

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 15,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,
    //CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json'
    ],
]);

$responseRaw = curl_exec($curl);

// Errores CURL
if (curl_errno($curl)) {
    $err = curl_error($curl);
    curl_close($curl);

    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "Error CURL: $err",
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

$httpStatus = curl_getinfo($curl, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

curl_close($curl);

// Errores HTTP
if ($httpStatus !== 200) {
    if($httpStatus == 404) {
        return [
            "message" => "Error al consultar API - HTTP $httpStatus",
            "count" => 0, 
            "items" => []
        ];
    }
    else {
        return [
            "error"    => true,
            "message"  => "Error al consultar API - HTTP $httpStatus",
            "respuesta"=> $responseRaw,
            "url"      => $url
        ];
    }
}

$response = json_decode($responseRaw, true);

// Validar JSON
if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "JSON inválido: " . json_last_error_msg(),
        "raw" => $responseRaw,
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

return $response;

scripts.title: FF_CH_Consultar_Cliente_SC
scripts.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  Welcome to ProcessMaker 4 Script Editor 
 *  To access Environment Variables use getenv("ENV_VAR_NAME") 
 *  To access Request Data use $data 
 *  To access Configuration Data use $config 
 *  To preview your script, click the Run button using the provided input and config data 
 *  Return an array and it will be merged with the processes data 
 *  Example API to retrieve user email by their ID $api->users()->getUserById(1)['email'] 
 *  API Documentation https://github.com/ProcessMaker/docker-executor-php/tree/master/docs/sdk 
 */

const RUT_ESTRICTO_REGEX = '/^\d{7,8}-[0-9K]$/';

function calcularDv(string $cuerpo): string {
    $suma = 0;
    $factor = 2;

    for ($i = strlen($cuerpo) - 1; $i >= 0; $i--) {
        $dig = ord($cuerpo[$i]) - 48;
        if ($dig < 0 || $dig > 9) return '';
        $suma += $dig * $factor;
        $factor = ($factor === 7) ? 2 : $factor + 1;
    }

    $mod = 11 - ($suma % 11);
    if ($mod === 11) return '0';
    if ($mod === 10) return 'K';
    return chr(48 + $mod);
}

function validarRut($rutEntrada): bool {
    if (!is_string($rutEntrada)) return false;

    // Normaliza: quita puntos y espacios, mayúsculas
    $rut = strtoupper(trim($rutEntrada));
    $rut = str_replace(['.', ' '], '', $rut);

    if (strlen($rut) < 3) return false;

    // Inserta guion si falta
    if (strpos($rut, '-') === false && strlen($rut) >= 2) {
        $rut = substr($rut, 0, -1) . '-' . substr($rut, -1);
    }

    if (!preg_match(RUT_ESTRICTO_REGEX, $rut)) return false;

    [$cuerpo, $dv] = explode('-', $rut, 2);
    return calcularDv($cuerpo) === $dv;
}

$urlBase = getenv("API_GATEWAY_URL");
$apiKey = getenv("CL_API_KEY");

if (!$urlBase) {
    throw new RuntimeException("API_GATEWAY_URL no está definida");
}

if (!$apiKey) {
    throw new RuntimeException("CL_API_KEY no está definida");
}

$path = "/api/find-client/corporate/api/cimm/apigateway/customer/";

$rut_c = $data["frmDC_rutContratante"];

[$numDoc, $dv] = explode('-', $rut_c);

// Validamos el RUT
if(!validarRut($rut_c)) {
    return [
        "result" => 0,
        "rutIsValid" => false,
        "rut" => null,
        "fullName" => null
    ];
}

// Construir URL completa
$url = $urlBase . $path . $numDoc;

// Inicializar curl
$curl = curl_init($url);

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 10,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 30,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,
    CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json',
        'x-api-key: ' . $apiKey
    ],
]);

$responseRaw = curl_exec($curl);

// Errores CURL
if (curl_errno($curl)) {
    $err = curl_error($curl);
    curl_close($curl);

    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "Error CURL: $err",
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

$httpStatus = curl_getinfo($curl, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

curl_close($curl);

// Errores HTTP
if ($httpStatus !== 200) {
    if($httpStatus == 404) {
        return [
            "result" => 0, 
            "rut" => null,
            "fullName" => null
        ];
    }
    else {
        return [
            "error"    => true,
            "message"  => "Error al consultar API - HTTP $httpStatus",
            "respuesta"=> $responseRaw,
            "url"      => $url
        ];
    }
}

$response = json_decode($responseRaw, true);

// Validar JSON
if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "JSON inválido: " . json_last_error_msg(),
        "raw" => $responseRaw,
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

return [
    "result" => 1,
    "rut" => $response["rut"] . "-" . $response["dv"],
    "name" =>  $response["firstName"],
    "lastName" => $response["lastName"],
    "mandates" => $response["mandates"]
];

scripts.title: FF_CH_Obtener_Comunas_SC
scripts.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  Welcome to ProcessMaker 4 Script Editor 
 *  To access Environment Variables use getenv("ENV_VAR_NAME") 
 *  To access Request Data use $data 
 *  To access Configuration Data use $config 
 *  To preview your script, click the Run button using the provided input and config data 
 *  Return an array and it will be merged with the processes data 
 *  Example API to retrieve user email by their ID $api->users()->getUserById(1)['email'] 
 *  API Documentation https://github.com/ProcessMaker/docker-executor-php/tree/master/docs/sdk 
 */

$urlBase = getenv("API_GATEWAY_URL");
$apiKey = getenv("CL_API_KEY");

if (!$urlBase) {
    throw new RuntimeException("API_GATEWAY_URL no está definida");
}

if (!$apiKey) {
    throw new RuntimeException("CL_API_KEY no está definida");
}

$path = "/api/find-municipalities/corporate/api/cimm/apigateway/form/cities/";

$cityCode = $data["frmDC_ciudadContratante"];

// Construir URL completa
$url = $urlBase . $path . $cityCode . "/municipalities";

// Inicializar curl
$curl = curl_init($url);

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 15,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,
    CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json',
        'x-api-key: ' . $apiKey
    ],
]);

$responseRaw = curl_exec($curl);

// Errores CURL
if (curl_errno($curl)) {
    $err = curl_error($curl);
    curl_close($curl);

    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "Error CURL: $err",
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

$httpStatus = curl_getinfo($curl, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

curl_close($curl);

// Errores HTTP
if ($httpStatus !== 200) {
    if($httpStatus == 404) {
        return [
            "message" => "Error al consultar API - HTTP $httpStatus",
            "count" => 0, 
            "items" => []
        ];
    }
    else {
        return [
            "error"    => true,
            "message"  => "Error al consultar API - HTTP $httpStatus",
            "respuesta"=> $responseRaw,
            "url"      => $url
        ];
    }
}

$response = json_decode($responseRaw, true);

// Validar JSON
if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "JSON inválido: " . json_last_error_msg(),
        "raw" => $responseRaw,
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

return $response;

scripts.title: FF_CH_Obtener_Ciudades_SC
scripts.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  Welcome to ProcessMaker 4 Script Editor 
 *  To access Environment Variables use getenv("ENV_VAR_NAME") 
 *  To access Request Data use $data 
 *  To access Configuration Data use $config 
 *  To preview your script, click the Run button using the provided input and config data 
 *  Return an array and it will be merged with the processes data 
 *  Example API to retrieve user email by their ID $api->users()->getUserById(1)['email'] 
 *  API Documentation https://github.com/ProcessMaker/docker-executor-php/tree/master/docs/sdk 
 */

$urlBase = getenv("API_GATEWAY_URL");
$apiKey = getenv("CL_API_KEY");

if (!$urlBase) {
    throw new RuntimeException("API_GATEWAY_URL no está definida");
}

if (!$apiKey) {
    throw new RuntimeException("CL_API_KEY no está definida");
}

$path = "/api/find-cities/corporate/api/cimm/apigateway/form/cities";

// Construir URL completa
$url = $urlBase . $path;

// Inicializar curl
$curl = curl_init($url);

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 15,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,
    CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json',
        'x-api-key: ' . $apiKey
    ],
]);

$responseRaw = curl_exec($curl);

// Errores CURL
if (curl_errno($curl)) {
    $err = curl_error($curl);
    curl_close($curl);

    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "Error CURL: $err",
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

$httpStatus = curl_getinfo($curl, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

curl_close($curl);

// Errores HTTP
if ($httpStatus !== 200) {
    if($httpStatus == 404) {
        return [
            "message" => "Error al consultar API - HTTP $httpStatus",
            "count" => 0, 
            "items" => []
        ];
    }
    else {
        return [
            "error"    => true,
            "message"  => "Error al consultar API - HTTP $httpStatus",
            "respuesta"=> $responseRaw,
            "url"      => $url
        ];
    }
}

$response = json_decode($responseRaw, true);

// Validar JSON
if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "JSON inválido: " . json_last_error_msg(),
        "raw" => $responseRaw,
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

return $response;
